description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern L-shaped kitchen configuration with a combination of base cabinets, wall cabinets, and a tall pantry unit. The countertop is a dark, marble-like surface with subtle white veining, providing a striking contrast to the predominantly white cabinetry. The base section includes multiple drawers and doors, as well as integrated appliances such as an oven and a cooktop, with a visible sink cutout. The upper section has open shelving and closed cabinets, while the tall unit offers additional storage and appliance housing. The cabinetry is accented with sleek, linear bar pulls and is set against a wood-textured floor. The overall design is contemporary, functional, and suitable for urban residential or communal kitchen spaces.
description: Modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry with white panels, dark marble countertop, and integrated appliances. Features drawers, doors, open shelving, and a tall pantry unit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the cabinetry, including the countertop, base cabinets, and tall pantry unit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the countertop, the open shelving, and the tall pantry cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open shelving, the arrangement of drawers and doors, and the cutouts for appliances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tall pantry, open shelves, and the transition between base and wall cabinets.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite with base cabinets, wall cabinets, and tall pantry cabinet
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, drawers, and open shelf
